criteria.not_ready: requires no Critical findings; Major and Minor findings are warnings in low mode.

ready_with_warnings.note: Major and Minor findings are warnings in low mode.

issues.title: Contract examples are incomplete
issues.description: The spec is implementable, but examples can be more explicit.
issues.impact: Implementation can proceed in low mode with a warning.
issues.fix: Add example request and response payloads when strengthening the spec.

prompt_mode: Readiness policy for low review level.
